dialogue_text: There are her two feet, still sticking out from under a block of wood.
source_excerpt: "Your house did, anyway," replied the little old woman, with a laugh, "and that is the same thing. See!" she continued, pointing to the corner of the house. "There are her two feet, still sticking out from under a block of wood."
